schema.name: Taypro Solar Cleaning Robot Manufacturer India
schema.description: Made-in-India manufacturer of autonomous and semi-automatic waterless solar cleaning robots for utility-scale PV.

hero.title: Solar cleaning robot manufacturer India: OEM, not importer
hero.subtitle: Taypro designs and manufactures waterless cleaning robots at Chakan, Pune: GLYDE, GLYDE-X, NYUMA, NYUMA-X, HELYX, and MINY. Among India's largest deployed robotic cleaning fleets with pan-India service, NECTYR software, and both CAPEX and OPEX commercial models.

stats.heading: Why procurement teams shortlist Taypro as an Indian OEM

card0.label: Pune production hub
card0.body: Design, assembly, and test in Maharashtra, not a reseller of imported robots.

card1.label: Deployed robotic capacity
card1.body: Production-scale fleet across Indian utility and C&I plants.

card2.label: Live utility deployments
card2.body: Named MW references on SECI, DVC, and IPP projects for due diligence.

card3.label: Field-validated robots
card3.body: Third-party certification plus ISO-aligned manufacturing processes.

prose.heading: What to verify in a solar cleaning robot manufacturer RFQ
prose.p1: Procurement teams searching solar cleaning robot manufacturer India need more than a brochure: validate manufacturing location, tracker-specific SKUs, spare parts logistics, fleet software, and field service density, not just dust removal claims on a datasheet.
prose.p2: Taypro manufactures in Chakan, Pune and deploys the same robots under robot CAPEX + AMC or OPEX managed service. You get hardware, operators, spares, and NECTYR fleet portal from one accountable vendor.
prose.p3: Product matrix covers fixed tilt (GLYDE dual-pass microfiber, NYUMA PBT single-pass), single-axis trackers (GLYDE-X, NYUMA-X, CRADYL transfer), semi-automatic scattered blocks (HELYX), and compact C&I rooftops (MINY).
prose.p4: Indian patents protect Taypro dual-pass waterless technology. Compare brush philosophy, connectivity (LTE, mesh, LoRa), and NECTYR audit trails when evaluating import alternatives with longer spare lead times.
prose.p5: Request MW references, robots-per-MW modelling, and AMC SLA before committee sign-off. Taypro publishes 132+ project references and indicative pricing tools for finance review.
prose.p6: Manufacturer evaluation should include site visit or video audit of production, field service hubs, and NECTYR demo, especially for 50 MW+ programmes.

pillar0.title: In-house R&D & production
pillar0.body: Robots engineered for Indian dust, heat, and monsoon, assembled and tested in Pune before field deployment.

pillar1.title: Pan-India service network
pillar1.body: Regional spares, same-day breakdown targets, and remote diagnostics through NECTYR on multi-MW fleets.

pillar2.title: NECTYR fleet software included
pillar2.body: Scheduling, coverage audits, and AMC tickets, standard on CAPEX and OPEX programmes, not a separate licence.

products.heading: Taypro robot models by plant type
products.subheading: Select fixed tilt, tracker, rooftop, or semi-automatic based on row geometry.

product0.title: GLYDE: dual-pass fixed tilt
product0.body: Patented waterless microfiber flagship for utility fixed-tilt plants. Highest dust removal per cycle on sticky films.

product1.title: GLYDE-X / NYUMA-X: trackers
product1.body: Single-axis tracker robots with CRADYL row transfer. Validated on 250–300 MW Gujarat references.

product2.title: HELYX & MINY
product2.body: Semi-automatic for scattered blocks; MINY compact for commercial C&I rooftops.

eligibility.title: When Taypro as manufacturer is the right vendor
eligibility.for0: Utility ground-mount or tracker plants from ~10 MW with recurring soiling
eligibility.for1: Buyers who want Indian OEM with local spares and AMC, not import-only supply
eligibility.for2: Procurement requiring NECTYR audit trails and named MW references
eligibility.for3: CAPEX purchase or OPEX managed service from the same manufacturer
eligibility.not0: Residential single-home rooftops without C&I scale
eligibility.not1: Buyers seeking only generic pressure-washing without robotic programme
eligibility.not2: Full-plant EPC scope (HV, inverters), Taypro partners on cleaning layer only

highlight.heading: The vendor question
highlight.lead: Can your manufacturer prove field scale, not just factory photos?
highlight.body: Taypro cites 150+ live sites, 300–360 MW single-plant references, and NECTYR telemetry on deployed fleets. Ask every vendor for named MW, robots-per-MW, and coverage audit samples.

proseSecondary.heading: Why local manufacturing matters at MW scale
proseSecondary.p1: Import robots face spare latency, tracker validation gaps, and AMC networks that thin out beyond tier-one cities. Indian OEM production reduces truck-roll time and aligns cleaning SOPs with local dust chemistry.
proseSecondary.p2: Taypro dual-pass microfiber (GLYDE) targets sticky cementitious films common in Gujarat industrial belts. PBT single-pass (NYUMA) suits capex-efficient fixed-tilt fleets. Match brush technology to soiling study, not generic desert assumptions.
proseSecondary.p3: Mint Tech4Good 2024 recognition reflects field impact of waterless robotics plus data platform work, validate with your own pilot PR data, not awards alone.

faq.heading: Solar cleaning robot manufacturer India: FAQ
faq.subheading: Vendor diligence questions for procurement teams.
faq.a0: Chakan, Pune, Maharashtra: design, assembly, and testing for utility-scale waterless cleaning robots.
faq.q1: Is Taypro an importer or OEM?
faq.a1: Taypro is a Made-in-India manufacturer. We design and build GLYDE, NYUMA, HELYX, and related models in Pune.
faq.a2: TÜV NORD field validation, ISO-aligned manufacturing, IP65 environmental rating on deployed platforms.
faq.a3: GLYDE-X or NYUMA-X with CRADYL row-transfer where needed, validated on 250–300 MW Gujarat tracker references.
faq.q4: Is NECTYR included with robot purchase?
faq.a4: Yes. Fleet portal for scheduling, coverage, and AMC is included on standard utility CAPEX and OPEX programmes.
faq.q5: Can we buy robots only without service?
faq.a5: Robot CAPEX includes commissioning support; AMC is strongly recommended for utility uptime. OPEX is the fully managed alternative.
faq.q6: How does Taypro compare to imported robots?
faq.a6: Evaluate spare lead time, tracker SKUs, India field density, and NECTYR audit evidence, not brochure dust-removal % alone.
faq.a7: Named deployments include Akhadana 360 MW, Bachau DVC 300 MW, and Neneva 250 MW: see projects section on this page.
faq.q8: Does Taypro offer OPEX as manufacturer?
faq.a8: Yes. Same robots deployed under OPEX: manufacturer owns fleet and bills per panel cleaned.
faq.a9: MINY compact robot for commercial C&I rooftops. Utility RFQ focus is ground-mount and tracker.
faq.q10: How to request factory or site visit?
faq.a10: Contact Taypro with MW, state, and procurement timeline. Engineering and leadership visits available for enterprise RFQs.
faq.a11: Directional CAPEX bands in the robot price guide and ROI calculator. Binding quotes follow site assessment.
